evals.prompt: Run an accessibility audit on our React dashboard. It has a sidebar nav, data table, modal dialogs, form inputs, and chart widgets. Check WCAG 2.1 AA compliance.
evals.expected_output: Audit report with axe scan results, keyboard navigation test, semantic HTML review, color contrast checks

assertions.name: axe_scan
assertions.description: Runs axe-core or equivalent automated accessibility scan

assertions.name: keyboard_testing
assertions.description: Tests Tab/Enter/Escape navigation through all interactive elements

assertions.name: semantic_html
assertions.description: Reviews HTML elements (button vs div, table vs divs, headings hierarchy)

assertions.name: color_contrast
assertions.description: Checks contrast ratios with specific hex values and required ratios

assertions.name: severity_rated
assertions.description: Each finding has WCAG criterion reference and severity

evals.prompt: Audit our e-commerce checkout form for accessibility. It has 4 steps with progress indicator, credit card input, address autocomplete, and a submit button. Many inputs use placeholder text instead of labels.
evals.expected_output: Audit flagging missing labels, placeholder-as-label issues, focus management between steps, and form error association

assertions.name: missing_labels
assertions.description: Flags inputs using placeholder instead of visible labels

assertions.name: focus_management
assertions.description: Reviews focus movement between checkout steps

assertions.name: error_association
assertions.description: Checks aria-describedby linking errors to inputs

assertions.name: progress_indicator_a11y
assertions.description: Reviews if progress indicator conveys step to screen readers

assertions.name: submit_button
assertions.description: Verifies submit button is a real button element, not a styled div

evals.prompt: Our mobile-responsive dashboard uses a hamburger menu on small screens, icon-only buttons in the sidebar, and color-coded status badges (green=active, red=inactive). Audit for accessibility issues.
evals.expected_output: Audit covering icon-only button labels, color-only indicators, hamburger menu accessibility, and touch targets

assertions.name: icon_button_labels
assertions.description: Flags icon-only buttons missing aria-label

assertions.name: color_only_indicators
assertions.description: Flags color-only status badges that need text or icon alternatives

assertions.name: hamburger_menu_a11y
assertions.description: Reviews if hamburger menu has aria-expanded and proper button element

assertions.name: touch_targets
assertions.description: Checks minimum 44x44px touch targets for mobile

assertions.name: findings_with_wcag
assertions.description: Each finding references specific WCAG criterion

evals.prompt: Audit a React data table component for keyboard accessibility. Users should be able to sort by clicking column headers, select rows with checkboxes, and paginate. The table currently works with mouse only.
evals.expected_output: Audit identifying missing keyboard support, aria roles, sort indicators, and focus management

assertions.name: keyboard_sort
assertions.description: Flags that column headers need to be keyboard-activatable (Enter/Space)

assertions.name: aria_sort
assertions.description: Recommends aria-sort on sortable headers

assertions.name: checkbox_keyboard
assertions.description: Row selection checkboxes must work with Space key

assertions.name: table_roles
assertions.description: Verifies proper table/thead/tbody/tr/th/td semantic elements

assertions.name: pagination_keyboard
assertions.description: Page controls must be keyboard navigable

evals.prompt: Audit our modal dialog component. When opened, the background should not be scrollable, Tab should cycle within the modal, Escape should close it, and focus should return to the trigger element on close.
evals.expected_output: Audit checking focus trap, scroll lock, Escape handling, focus return, and dialog role

assertions.name: focus_trap
assertions.description: Verifies Tab key cycles within modal, not escaping to background

assertions.name: escape_to_close
assertions.description: Verifies Escape key closes the modal

assertions.name: focus_return
assertions.description: Verifies focus returns to the trigger button on close

assertions.name: dialog_role
assertions.description: Modal has role=dialog and aria-modal=true

assertions.name: scroll_lock
assertions.description: Background scroll is locked when modal is open
